plot_frame_box.description: Axis box detected from long dark vertical/horizontal frame lines; bottom row of frame is y=392 (the y=0 baseline of the bars).

data_to_pixel_formula.col: col = category_index_pixel (lookup: Web=135, API=256, Worker=377, Cron=499, DB=620)

worked_example.scenario: Worker bar, cumulative top of IO Wait (entire bar = 91)
worked_example.verification: Observed bar top at column 377 is row 70 (y_data = 90.71). Matches printed value 91 within 0.3 pixels.

detection_internals.ytick_detection: scanned x in [40,65] for dark text rows, grouped contiguous; six centers found
detection_internals.xtick_detection: scanned y in [395,415] for dark text columns, grouped contiguous; five centers found
detection_internals.bar_detection: scanned non-white pixels at y=370; five contiguous runs found (excluding frame edges at x=71 and x=685)
detection_internals.segment_boundary_rule: per bar center column, walked y=37..391 classifying each row's majority color (over inner columns x0+5..x1-5) into {CPU, MEM, IOW, BG, EDGE, GRID}; recorded color->color transitions only. Gridlines were classified as GRID and ignored.
